item.title: 从 Spotify 到 YouTube：我如何构建 Python 脚本来转换播放列表 | From Spotify to YouTube: How I Built a Python Script to Convert Playlists
item.description:
约格什瓦兰R

发表于 4 月 22 日

我开发了将 Spotify 播放列表转换为 YouTube 播放列表的脚本。 我在这里分享我是如何做到的。

设置环境

安装所需的python包

pip install google-auth google-auth-oauthlib google-auth-httplib2 spotipy pytube

转到 Spotify 开发人员仪表板并使用您的 Spotify 帐户登录。
  • 单击“创建应用程序”按钮并填写必要的信息，例如您的应用程序的名称和描述。
  • 创建应用程序后，您将被带到应用程序仪表板。 在这里，您会找到您的客户端 ID 和客户端密码，它们用于通过 Spotify API 对您的应用程序进行身份验证。
  • 获取您的客户端 ID 和客户端密码后。
  • 创建文件spotify_client.py
  • 添加所需的导入语句
    • from dataclasses import dataclass import spotipy from spotipy.oauth2 import SpotifyClientCredentials
    • 创建数据类Playlist以轻松访问数据
    @dataclass class Playlist: name: str description: str tracks: list[str]
    • 创建类SpotipyClient
     class SpotifyClient: def __init__(self) -> None: client_id = "<your_client_id>" client_secret = "<your_client_secret>" auth_manager = SpotifyClientCredentials(client_id=client_id, client_secret=client_secret) self.spotify = spotipy.Spotify(auth_manager=auth_manager) def get_playlist(self, id: str): playlist = self.spotify.playlist(id) queries = [] tracks = playlist['tracks']['items'] for track in tracks: track_name = track['track']['name'] artists = ', '.join([artist['name'] for artist in track['track']['artists']]) queries.append(f'{track_name} by {artists}') return(Playlist(playlist['name'], playlist['description'], queries))

    在类初始化时，使用凭据和get_playlist方法登录 Spotify，获取播放列表名称、描述和曲目名称以进行搜索查询并返回Playlist 。

    转到 Google Cloud Console，使用您的 Google 帐户登录，然后创建一个新项目。
  • 创建项目后，从顶部导航栏的项目下拉菜单中选择它。
  • 转到左侧边栏 API 和服务部分中的凭据页面。
  • 单击“创建凭据”按钮并选择“OAuth 客户端 ID”。
  • 在 OAuth 2.0 客户端 ID 中创建选择编辑按钮后，在“Authorized JavaScript origins”下添加此 URI http://localhost:8080并在“Authorized redirect URIs”下
  • 单击下载按钮将凭据下载到您的项目目录中。 将文件重命名为client_secret.json
  • 转到左侧边栏 API 和服务部分中的 OAuth 同意屏幕。 在测试用户添加您的 Gmail id。
  • 创建文件youtube_client.py
  • 添加导入语句
    • from pytube import Search from pytube.contrib.search import logger from google_auth_oauthlib.flow import InstalledAppFlow from googleapiclient.discovery import build logger. Disabled = True

    创建类YouTubeClient

     class YouTubeClient: def __init__(self) -> None: flow = InstalledAppFlow.from_client_secrets_file( "client_secret.json", scopes=["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.force-ssl"], ) creds = flow.run_local_server() self.youtube = build("youtube", "v3", credentials=creds) def create_playlist(self, name: str, description: str): playlist = ( self.youtube.playlists() .insert( part="snippet,status", body={ "snippet": { "title": name, "description": description, "defaultLanguage": "en", }, "status": {"privacyStatus": "public"}, }, ) .execute() ) return playlist def add_song_playlist(self, playlist_id: str, video_id: str): request = ( self.youtube.playlistItems() .insert( part="snippet", body={ "snippet": { "playlistId": playlist_id, "resourceId": {"kind": "youtube#video", "videoId": video_id}, } }, ) ) playlist_item = request.execute() return playlist_item def search_video(self, query: str): return Search(query).results[0].video_id

    在类初始化时，使用 OAuth 登录 YouTube。 方法create_playlist只是创建具有给定名称和描述的播放列表，而add_song_playlist方法将视频添加到给定的播放列表。

    行车守则

    • 最后驱动一段代码，新建文件main.py
     import sys import time from spotify_client import SpotifyClient from youtube_client import YouTubeClient spotify = SpotifyClient() youtube = YouTubeClient() spotify_playlist_id = sys.argv[1] spotify_playlist = spotify.get_playlist(spotify_playlist_id) youtube_playlist_id = youtube.create_playlist(spotify_playlist.name, spotify_playlist.description)['id'] for track in spotify_playlist.tracks: print(f"Searching for {track}") id = youtube.search_video(track) youtube.add_song_playlist(youtube_playlist_id, id) print("Added...") time.sleep(1) print("Done 👍") print(f"https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list={youtube_playlist_id}") You get playlist id from the playlist URL of spotify. In this script, the playlist id get as command line args.
     python main.py <playlist_id>

    这将打开一个浏览器窗口以登录到谷歌帐户。 只需登录即可。 执行脚本后，它将打印播放列表链接。

    谢谢

    一旦暂停，yogeshwaran01 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，yogeshwaran01 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    取消发布后，yogeshwaran01 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 yogeshwaran01 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 yogeshwaran01 的方法：

    降低 yogeshwaran01 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    取消标记 yogeshwaran01 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    YOGESHWARAN R

    Posted on Apr 22

    I developed the script to convert the Spotify playlist to YouTube playlist. I am here to share how I done this.

    Setting up environment

    Install the required python packages

    pip install google-auth google-auth-oauthlib google-auth-httplib2 spotipy pytube

    Spotify part

    • Go to the Spotify Developer Dashboard and log in with your Spotify account.
    • Click on the "Create an App" button and fill out the necessary information, such as the name and description of your application.
    • Once you've created the app, you'll be taken to the app dashboard. Here, you'll find your client ID and client secret, which are used to authenticate your application with the Spotify API.
    • After getting your client ID and client secret.
    • Create a file spotify_client.py
    • Add required import statement 
    from dataclasses import dataclass import spotipy
from spotipy.oauth2 import SpotifyClientCredentials
    • Create data class Playlist to access data easily 
    @dataclass
class Playlist: name: str description: str tracks: list[str]
    • Create class SpotipyClient 
    class SpotifyClient: def __init__(self) -> None: client_id = "<your_client_id>" client_secret = "<your_client_secret>" auth_manager = SpotifyClientCredentials(client_id=client_id, client_secret=client_secret) self.spotify = spotipy.Spotify(auth_manager=auth_manager) def get_playlist(self, id: str): playlist = self.spotify.playlist(id) queries = [] tracks = playlist['tracks']['items'] for track in tracks: track_name = track['track']['name'] artists = ', '.join([artist['name'] for artist in track['track']['artists']]) queries.append(f'{track_name} by {artists}') return(Playlist(playlist['name'], playlist['description'], queries))

    On class initialization, login into the Spotify using credentials and get_playlist method fetch the playlist name, description and track name for search query and return a Playlist.

    YouTube part

    • Go to the Google Cloud Console, sign in with your Google account, and create a new project.
    • Once your project is created, select it from the project dropdown menu in the top navigation bar.
    • Go to the Credentials page in the API & Services section of the left sidebar.
    • Click on the "Create Credentials" button and select "OAuth client ID".
    • After creating select edit button in the OAuth 2.0 Client IDs, Under 'Authorized JavaScript origins' add this URI http://localhost:8080 and under "Authorized redirect URIs
    • " add this URI http://localhost:8080/ and then click save.
    • Click the download button to download the credentials in your project directory. Rename the file to client_secret.json
    • Go to the OAuth consent screen in the API & Services section of the left sidebar. Under test user add your Gmail id.
    • Create file youtube_client.py
    • Add import statements 
    from pytube import Search
from pytube.contrib.search import logger from google_auth_oauthlib.flow import InstalledAppFlow
from googleapiclient.discovery import build logger. Disabled = True

    The logger of pytube is disabled to avoid unnecessary warings.

    • Create class YouTubeClient 
    class YouTubeClient: def __init__(self) -> None: flow = InstalledAppFlow.from_client_secrets_file( "client_secret.json", scopes=["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.force-ssl"], ) creds = flow.run_local_server() self.youtube = build("youtube", "v3", credentials=creds) def create_playlist(self, name: str, description: str): playlist = ( self.youtube.playlists() .insert( part="snippet,status", body={ "snippet": { "title": name, "description": description, "defaultLanguage": "en", }, "status": {"privacyStatus": "public"}, }, ) .execute() ) return playlist def add_song_playlist(self, playlist_id: str, video_id: str): request = ( self.youtube.playlistItems() .insert( part="snippet", body={ "snippet": { "playlistId": playlist_id, "resourceId": {"kind": "youtube#video", "videoId": video_id}, } }, ) ) playlist_item = request.execute() return playlist_item def search_video(self, query: str): return Search(query).results[0].video_id

    On class initialization, login into the YouTube using OAuth. Method create_playlist just create playlist with given name and description and add_song_playlist method add video to the given playlist.

    Driving Code

    • Finally to drive a code, create new file, main.py 
    import sys
import time
from spotify_client import SpotifyClient
from youtube_client import YouTubeClient spotify = SpotifyClient()
youtube = YouTubeClient() spotify_playlist_id = sys.argv[1] spotify_playlist = spotify.get_playlist(spotify_playlist_id) youtube_playlist_id = youtube.create_playlist(spotify_playlist.name, spotify_playlist.description)['id'] for track in spotify_playlist.tracks: print(f"Searching for {track}") id = youtube.search_video(track) youtube.add_song_playlist(youtube_playlist_id, id) print("Added...") time.sleep(1) print("Done 👍")
print(f"https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list={youtube_playlist_id}") You get playlist id from the playlist URL of spotify. In this script, the playlist id get as command line args.


    python main.py <playlist_id>

    This will open a browser window to login into the google account. Just login into it. After execution of script it will print the playlist link.

    Thank you

    Mudacumura Brunoblaise - Apr 1

    Mudacumura Brunoblaise - Apr 1

    Mudacumura Brunoblaise - Apr 1

    Mudacumura Brunoblaise - Apr 1

    Once suspended, yogeshwaran01 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, yogeshwaran01 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by yogeshwaran01 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If yogeshwaran01 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag yogeshwaran01:

    Make all posts by yogeshwaran01 less visible

    yogeshwaran01 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging yogeshwaran01 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: yogeshwaran01

item.title: 刚加入社区 | Just Joined the Community
item.description:
发表于 4 月 22 日

我很高兴也很高兴能成为这个美妙而令人惊叹的社区的一员。 我是开源的新手，因为我是一个孤独的人，但我现在想联系以向周围的人学习更多，因为我相信人们有故事要讲，可以从这些故事中学到很多东西，也可以建立牢固的联系这可能会持续一生。 我现在是一名网络开发人员，但我的目标是成为一名拥有令人难以置信的黑客技能的首席技术专家。 精英之一。 但是为了让我到达那里，我需要连接。 如果我们的利益一致，我会非常乐意结识您，这样我们就可以开始合作，因为未来就在眼前，没有时间可以拖延了。 我真的很高兴再次成为这个社区的一员。 让我们做伟大的事情。 为神为人

一旦暂停，agbaby09 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，agbaby09 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，agbaby09 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 agbaby09 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 agbaby09 的方法：

降低 agbaby09 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 agbaby09 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

AGbaby09

Posted on Apr 22

I am so grateful and excited to be a part of this wonderful and amazing community. I am new to open source because I am a solitary person but I want to connect now to learn more from people all around because I believe people have stories to tell and a lot can be learnt from those stories as well as the creation of strong bonds that may last a lifetime. I am a web developer for now but I aim to be a chief technologist with mind boggling hacking skills. One of the elites. But for me to get there, I need to connect. If our interests align, I would be more than happy to make your acquaintance so we start working together because the future is now and there is no time for delay. I'm really happy to be part of this community once again. Let's do great things. FOR GOD AND MAN

Sardar Mudassar Ali Khan - Apr 21

Once suspended, agbaby09 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, agbaby09 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by agbaby09 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If agbaby09 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag agbaby09:

Make all posts by agbaby09 less visible

agbaby09 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging agbaby09 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: agbaby09

item.title: 介绍 | Introduction
item.description:
威廉·纳约尔·卡穆伦加

发表于 4 月 22 日

大家好，我是 Wilhelm，一名喜欢使用 JavaScript 和 React 的 Web 开发人员。 我目前正在 Microverse 学习，这是一所面向远程开发人员的在线编码学校。 很高兴能遇见你们。

一旦暂停，wilhelmk109 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，wilhelmk109 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，wilhelmk109 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 wilhelmk109 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 wilhelmk109 的方法：

降低 wilhelmk109 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 wilhelmk109 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Wilhelm Naayole Kamulunga

Posted on Apr 22

Hi everyone, I am Wilhelm, a web developer who enjoys working with JavaScript and React. I am currently studying at Microverse, an online coding school for remote developers. Nice to meet you all.

Sardar Mudassar Ali Khan - Apr 21

Once suspended, wilhelmk109 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, wilhelmk109 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by wilhelmk109 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If wilhelmk109 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag wilhelmk109:

Make all posts by wilhelmk109 less visible

wilhelmk109 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging wilhelmk109 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: wilhelmk109

item.title: 微妙的彩虹渐变按钮 | Subtle rainbow gradient buttons
item.description:
一旦暂停，lukyvj 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，lukyvj 将可以再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，lukyvj 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 lukyvj 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 lukyvj 的方法：

降低 lukyvj 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 lukyvj 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, lukyvj will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, lukyvj will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by lukyvj will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If lukyvj is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag lukyvj:

Make all posts by lukyvj less visible

lukyvj consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging lukyvj will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: lukyvj
